channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Trump sends mixed messages on securing the Strait of Hormuz - CBS News

item.title: Israel hits Iran with waves of attacks and says it killed top Hezbollah commander - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Israel hits Iran with waves of attacks and says it killed top Hezbollah commander  The Guardian
  2. IDF destroys IRGC Ground Forces base in Tehran, begins striking mobile command centers  The Jerusalem Post
  3. Blasts reported across multiple Iranian cities  iranintl.com
  4. Tehran power outages raise alarm as Iranians fear strikes on critical infrastructure  PBS
  5. IDF says it bombed key IRGC ground forces base  The Times of Israel

item.title: Iran Update Special Report, April 1, 2026 - Institute for the Study of War
item.description:
1. Iran Update Special Report, April 1, 2026  Institute for the Study of War
  2. US and Israeli Strikes in Iran between March 28, 2026 at 2:00 PM ET and March 29, 2026 at 8:00 AM ET  Institute for the Study of War
  3. Trump Advisers on Iran Strikes: Why Israel Should Attack First  112.ua
  4. Iranian Retaliatory Strikes in the Middle East 3/31/26  Institute for the Study of War
  5. Live Coverage of the Iran–U.S.–Israel Conflict / April 02  WANA News Agency
item.source: Institute for the Study of War
